title: [phase:critique] [family:ui-runtime-review] [provider_hint:subagent] Review the current Happy production resolution. Facts: production /happy/ serves updated HTML with Live Session wired to /cockpit; /cockpit returns 200; unauthenticated GET /api/happy/state,/events,/task-detail return 401 by design...
summary_text: **Findings (Severity-first)** - **Medium**: Auth-stale state has no direct re-entry action where the user sees the error. The UI says “Reconnect credentials,” but `renderSyncStatus()` only updates text/pill; no button/link is rendered in the status strip. Re-entry exists only via separate Live controls (`home-open-live` / `live-open-primary`), which is indirect on iPhone. Refs: [app.js:122](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:122), [app.js:126](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:126), [index.html:56](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/index.html:56), [app.js:950](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:950), [app.js:958](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:958). - **Medium**: Task-detail auth expiry is also non-actionable. Sheet status changes to “detail auth expired,” but there is no in-sheet “re-login / open cockpit” path. Refs: [app.js:378](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:378), [app.js:813](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:813), [index.html:404](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/index.html:404). - **Low**: Sync/auth status discoverability is weak on mobile: the status strip is not sticky and uses small text (`11px` pills, `12px` copy), so stale/auth signals are easy to miss after scrolling. Refs: [styles.css:115](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/styles.css:115), [styles.css:131](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/styles.css:131), [styles.css:223](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/styles.css:223), [styles.css:77](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/styles.css:77). **Minimal mobile-first improvements** 1. Add a single conditional CTA in status strip for `errorCategory === "auth"`: `Re-enter in Cockpit` (calls existing `launchLiveSession()`), and for non-auth stale: `Retry now` (calls `syncRemoteState()`). Hook point: [app.js:73](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:73), markup near [index.html:56](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/index.html:56). 2. Add the same CTA in task sheet when `activeDetailStatus` is auth-expired so users can recover without closing context. Hook point: [app.js:791](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:791), [index.html:401](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/index.html:401). 3. Surface auth-stale persistently in bottom nav (e.g., `Live` tab badge/alert style) so it remains visible after scroll. Hook point: [index.html:368](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/index.html:368), [app.js:778](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:778).
